# mtncloud_cypher_secret (Resource)

Manages a secret in the MTN Cloud Cypher store (under the `secret/` mount). Secrets are immutable; any change forces a new resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_cypher_secret" "db_password" {
  key   = "myapp/db-password"
  value = var.db_password
  ttl   = 0 # 0 = no expiry
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The secret path under the `secret/` mount, e.g. `myapp/db-password`. Changing it forces a new secret.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The secret value. Changing it forces a new secret.

### Optional

- `ttl` (Number) Time-to-live of the secret lease in seconds. 0 means no expiry. Changing it forces a new secret.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the cypher entry.
